_comment: [R11-3] Low-end mobile profile — Moto G Power-class CPU + 4G slow throttle. Lighthouse's mobile-class emulation is the DEFAULT when no preset is specified, so this config simply omits `preset` (which would otherwise need to be one of perf/experimental/desktop). Thresholds are looser than desktop because mobile networks/CPUs simply are slower; they still catch real regressions (a perf score < 0.75 means something genuinely got worse, not just expected mobile overhead). [R11-CI-FIX-5] removed invalid `preset: mobile` that ETARGETed in run #9.
